In an epic story torn from the headlines, the Octonauts embark on their largest, most complex rescue mission ever - saving the Great Barrier Reef and all the creatures that live there from an invasion of coral-hungry crown-of-thorns starfish. The Octonauts meet a tiny coral polyp looking to find a home on the very same reef where the Octonauts are deploying their new medical base, the Gup-W, and the Gup-P, a specialised first responder emergency vehicle. To save the reef and their new polyp friend, the Octonauts must combine forces with a diverse crew of zapping, splatting and claw-snapping reef creatures to fend off the spiky, coral-munching starfish.

programme.title: The Mark of Zorro
programme.desc: (1974) Frank Langella plays a Mexican nobleman who returns home to find officials bleeding the country dry. So he dons a black mask and cape and becomes the avenging Zorro. [AD,S]

programme.title: Romancing the Stone
programme.desc: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia. [AD,S]

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption. [AD,S]

programme.title: Jules
programme.desc: (2023) Heartwarming low-sci-fi comedy starring Ben Kingsley. A widower in the early stages of dementia ends up with an unusual houseguest when a spaceship crashes in his garden. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Tad the Lost Explorer - Curse of the Mummy
programme.desc: (2022) Animated family adventure. After Tad accidentally unleashes a curse - doh! - he and his uncanny band of sidekicks must find the Emerald Tablet to save the world.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: (2019) Fun-filled family comedy starring John Cena. A macho fireman has to babysit three impish kids after saving them from a blaze in the remote California woodlands. [AD,S]

programme.title: Spies in Disguise
programme.desc: (2019) Animated spy comedy caper with the voice of Will Smith. The 'world's most awesome spy' gets framed and has to go undercover as a pigeon to prove his innocence. [S]

programme.title: Mysterious Island
programme.desc: (1961) Classic sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel. Two men fleeing the US Civil War find an island inhabited by monsters (animated by Ray Harryhausen) and the mysterious Captain Nemo.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman. [AD,S]

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: (2007) Nicolas Cage is Marvel's soul-hunting, hot-headed-biker antihero. When Mephistopheles's son starts causing trouble in hell, Ghost Rider is forced to sort it out. With Peter Fonda. [S]

programme.title: The Unbearable Weight of...
programme.desc: ...Massive Talent: (2022) Nicolas Cage stars as, er, Nic Cage - an unbearably talented actor caught up in a CIA investigation while trying to resurrect his ailing career. With Pedro Pascal. [AD,S]

programme.title: Rebel 2
programme.desc: AN INVESTIGATIVE JOURNALIST, GAGAN, MOVES TO BENGALURU AND ENDS UP LIVING IN A SUPPOSEDLY HAUNTED HOUSE. SOON, HE REALISES A CHANGE IN HIS BEHAVIOUR AFTER FALLING PREY TO SUPERNATURAL ACTIVITIES.

programme.title: Baahubali: The Beginning
programme.desc: In the kingdom of mahishmati, shivudu falls in love with a young warrior woman. while trying to woo her, he learns about the conflict-ridden past of his family and his true legacy.

programme.title: Aranmanai 3
programme.desc: Jyothi, the daughter of a landlord, gets haunted by an unknown entity in her childhood. however, when the spirit begins to trouble another member of her family, she decides to uncover its identity.

programme.title: F3
programme.desc: Venky and Varun, who plan on marrying rich wives, fall into the trap of their own making when they realise the brides they are wooing are not rich but greedy for money.

programme.title: Leo
programme.desc: Parthiban is a mild-mannered cafe owner in kashmir, who fends off a gang of murderous thugs and gains attention from a drug cartel claiming he was onnce a part of them.

programme.title: Ek Khiladi
programme.desc: Venky, a man who values his friends, goes against a local crime lord, babji, when he helps his best friend elope with the gangster's daughter. consequently, babji orders a manhunt for venky.

programme.title: Ek Aur Jaanbaz Khiladi
programme.desc: A fearless hero fights dangerous criminals with courage, strength, and determination, putting his life on the line to uphold justice and protect the weak in thrilling battles.

programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a terraced property in Kent, a bungalow in Dorset and a house in Leeds.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series. The Smiths return from a difficult and quarrelsome holiday, only to end up on a desert island with no memory of who they are and an obsession with an old advertisement for mixed nuts.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. Tina attends a house party with the goal of slow dancing later with Jimmy Jr and touching 'upper butts', but butt sweat from the fast-paced dancing that precedes it causes her to soak through her skirt and problems arise when the skirt gets caught in a dryer - meanwhile, Teddy uses some wooden pallets to build a bar and seating in the Belchers' basement that becomes a hit with Dalton and his influencer friends.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom about three desperate young men who reside in ancient Rome. When the boys get a dose of culture after Grumio is street-cast to play the part of Cupid in an upcoming play, Marcus becomes his agent and uses his new connections to impress Delphine - meanwhile, Stylax understudies the lead actor so he can meet some theatre groupies.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. When a motorcycle-riding robber known as the Dandy Highwayman takes more than just the usual riches on offer, it's up to the team to put a stop to his roguish ways.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. Professor Pericles sends Fred into an apocalyptic future in order to learn the location of the Planispheric Disc, but something's not right here...

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Animated adventure series following Shaggy, Scooby, Velma, Daphne and Fred as they travel around on what could be their final summer break together. Daphne brings the gang to Ireland to visit an ancient Blake family castle - as the gang becomes enchanted by the magical Emerald Isle, an angry rampaging giant makes them reconsider just how wonderful all the old myths and legends really are...

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Fashion entrepreneur Caz hopes to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies. Will any of them shine?

programme.title: Sam & Billie: Sister Act
programme.desc: Sam and Billie are back in this series that reunites the sisters as they enter the next chapter of their lives - with the kids a bit older, it's time for them to focus more on themselves and take a bit of sister time out whilst maintaining the crazy juggle of motherhood, full-on careers and celebrity life. This episode sees the sisters go on their first-ever holiday together to sunny Dubai which coincides with Sam's ambitious brand launch, but Billie is struggling with her health amidst the parties and glamour and receives a shocking diagnosis while there - meanwhile, Sam attempts to host an incredible super yacht party with Amanda Holden but the whole event is in jeopardy... will they even be able to leave port?

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: The show where people hope to find true love through their love of food - one lucky celebrity gets the chance to find romance as they enjoy three very special meals cooked for them by three very special blind dates. In this episode, reality TV star Bobby Norris is going to be given five menus, each of which has been put together by a potential blind date - the five men behind the menus have all come up with a three-course meal, but Bobby will only be having dinner with three of them. Bobby will choose his dates based on the menus that he most likes the look of, but who will he want to see for seconds when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Snake Bye: Porsha receives a surprise from ex-fiance Dennis, and Kenya, Kandi and Porsha wonder who is responsible for the alleged recording of Cynthia. [S] S12 Ep11

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Follow the lavish lives of six savvy champagne-swilling Beverly Hills women who were born for shopping and partying! The 14th series reunion concludes as Sutton and Dorit continue to go head-to-head, Erika is forced to confront Tom's damning conviction and also reveal how this saga has impacted her relationship with her son, and Kyle tearfully explores the end of her marriage while big sister Kathy struggles to wrap her head around it - as the night draws to a close, one Housewife storms off and leaves the rest of the women stunned and confused.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: They survived the Australian jungle or the Welsh castle, but now the most memorable campmates from I'm A Celebrity... return to South Africa and battle to become a Legend. [S] S2 Ep1

programme.title: Deal or No Deal Banker's Best Battles
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a look back at some of the most fearsome and exciting Deal or No Deal battles between hopeful players and the cruel Banker - this time we revisit Craig and Dori's games.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The whole group attend a charity event to raise money for Young Epilepsy, a charity close to Becks' heart after being diagnosed with epilepsy following the birth of her first child - Diags hosts a quiz while Jordan hosts an auction where Wills is one of the lots up for grabs. Elsewhere, Harry and Junaid come face-to-face for the first time since Harry sent Joe and Junaid his make-up product, and Dan and Ella have a heart-to-heart and learn that things might not be quite as over as they thought.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: A Hairy Situation: Eva struggles in her bid to get Marley's last name legally changed. Following Dennis's re-proposal to Porsha, he also has to win her family back. [S] S12 Ep12

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: New Friends, Same Jersey: US reality series. Teresa takes the opportunity to mend fences with Margaret when Melissa throws an '80s-inspired roller skating party. [S] S13 Ep1

programme.title: Deal or No Deal Banker's Best Battles
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a look back at some of the most iconic Deal or No Deal episodes as Matthew and Alex are given their opportunity to open the iconic red boxes this time.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: They survived the Australian jungle or the Welsh castle, but now the most memorable campmates from I'm A Celebrity... return to South Africa and battle to become a Legend. [S] S2 Ep1

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where the questions are all about logic and common sense and where the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show, but only some of them will get near the chance to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right for up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: WhatsApp Obsession: The Murder of Stephanie Hansen
programme.desc: On the 30th of December, 2022, 39-year-old Stephanie Hansen was brutally stabbed to death in her London home - her housemate and friend Sheldon Rodrigues initially appeared grief-stricken, yet behind his facade lay a chilling obsession. In the months before Stephanie's death, Rodrigues planted secret cameras and recording devices in their home and bombarded her with coercive WhatsApp messages - when Steph began a new relationship, his jealousy turned deadly. Through exclusive access to police bodycam footage, WhatsApp records and court evidence, this film reveals how the Metropolitan Police exposed Rodrigues' lies and uncovered the disturbing level of surveillance Steph was subjected to - featuring interviews with Steph's family, friends and the detectives who investigated the case, this powerful documentary unravels a story of obsession, control, and the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter goes to a business conference in Atlantic City with Preston, and Stewie helps Chris prepare for his role in Adam West High's presentation of Romeo and Juliet.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Nearing the night of the Oscars, Peter decides to pay homage to three different Oscar-winning stories and picks them by spinning a roulette wheel.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Meg becomes a getaway driver, and when Quagmire is unable to cure his hiccups, he asks Peter to kill him.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series. Francine's newfound friendship with a frog brings excitement to the whole Smith household, but it also drives their neighbour Greg crazy.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Rudy's father Sylvester invites the Belchers to a bowling birthday party, Rudy is anxious that his mother's charismatic boyfriend Paul will upstage his father and harm his self-esteem and enlists the Belcher kids to make Sylvester look cool - elsewhere, Linda tries on some attractive bowling shoes while Bob tries to remember the details of the first time that she said 'I love you' to him.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Bob gets a call from Teddy, who has accidentally got himself stuck inside a client's walk-in safe and needs Bob to come rescue him so the client won't find out and fire him, matters are complicated by the fact that Teddy doesn't know where he is - meanwhile, Linda and the kids are visited by a victorious basketball team and decide to make a giant celebratory hamburger called the Beef-hemoth for them.

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Sitcom set in a fictional police training college. Geeta is freaking out about the dreaded bleep test - but soon has an even bigger dilemma - Bob gets in touch with his inner Spider-Man, and Paul gets a final warning.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. A crime wave sweeps the city as the boys join a Roman military fitness class to protect themselves on the streets, Flavia introduces some dubious new security measures at work, and Grumio starts dating Agatha, a talented baker who may well be a feeder.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Rinat, George and Ernest battle to win the affections of Annabelle from Leeds. Will any of the lad wow her with their fashion choices?

programme.title: Sam & Billie: Sister Act
programme.desc: Sam and Billie are back in this series that reunites the sisters as they enter the next chapter of their lives - in this episode, Sam and Billie take part in a rebirthing workshop in a bid to reduce Billie's stress, but they aren't prepared for how emotional the session will be as they unearth past traumas. Elsewhere, Billie still hasn't got to the bottom of her mystery illness - so the sisters look to biological age testing for answers - Sam contemplates baby number four while the sisters juggle work life and mum life, and Billie heads off to Dubai for Greg's 40th birthday.

Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter for a mission where they must catch a carp with the bite filmed on underwater cameras - the destination is Chase Lakes in France, a 12-acre gravel pit with 250 carp weighing as much as over 70 pounds, but the carp are playing hard to get in the tough spring conditions and constant tweaking of tactics is required after seeing how they are feeding.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard. programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as Lee Mack hosts another episode in the second series of the show. The 1 Club is the ultimate leveller - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes, because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts... they're all about logic and common sense. It doesn't matter if you're 15 or 50 - this is the quiz that the whole family can play together. 100 contestants begin every show, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.title: Rocky II
programme.desc: Boxing drama sequel. Although working-class Philadelphia boxer Rocky Balboa lost his high-profile bout with the cocky world champion Apollo Creed, his Cinderella story caught the national sports media's attention and has now given him the chance to capitalise on his sudden fame - meanwhile, Creed is still smarting from nearly losing to some fighter that no-one has ever heard of and so arrogantly prods his newfound nemesis into getting back into the ring.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: The 13th entry in the James Bond film series. 007 is asked to investigate the murder of a fellow agent who was clutching a priceless Faberge egg at the time of his death - the trail leads to the mysterious Octopussy, whose travelling circus features a company of gorgeous and athletic women. Bond and Octopussy share a passionate attraction, but 007 soon discovers that the elegant exiled Afghan prince Kamal Khan is working with a mad Soviet officer to hurl mankind into World War III. As Bond tries to stop the nightmarish scheme, his exploits include a tense chase through the streets of India, a deadly brawl on top of a speeding train, and a treacherous mid-air knife fight on an airplane wing.

programme.title: Baby John
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Dhawan,Keerthy Suresh. To protect his daughter, Satya Verma vanishes. But danger resurfaces, forcing him to confront Babbar Sher and the ghosts of a life he tried to leave behind.

programme.title: Khoonkhar
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sreenivas,Rakul Preet Singh. Gagan and Sweety fall in love but are forced to break up because her father disapproves of him. While defending a family from thugs one day, Gagan unknowingly saves Sweety and vows to protect her.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priyanka Chopra. Krrish and his scientist father have to save the world and their own family from an evil man named Kaal and his team of human-animal mutants led by the ruthleSS Kaya. Will they succeed? How?

programme.title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never Off Duty
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Sonakshi Sinha. Virat uncovers a terrorist plan to bomb Mumbai. He leads his team into action, risking everything to prevent catastrophe and defend the city.

programme.title: 90 ML
programme.desc: Starring: Neha Solanki,Ravi Kishan. A close group of friends gather over drinks, but casual moments soon expose hidden emotions, strained relationships, &personal conflicts, forcing them to confront responsibility & friendship

programme.title: Guna 369
programme.desc: Starring: Kartikeya,Anagha. Guna, a happy-go-lucky man, believes in compromise over violence. But when pushed to extremes by a close one, how does he respond?

programme.title: Ghost (2019)
programme.desc: Starring: Gayathiri Iyer Shivam Bhaargava,Sanaya Irani. Karan Khanna, a rising politician, is accused of killing his wife, Barkha. As lawyer Simran defends him, strange encounters with a spirit blur the line between truth, guilt, and the supernatural.
